scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run backend:dev" "npm run react:dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && wait-on tcp:8000 && electron ."
scripts.backend:build: cd ../backend && python -m pip install pyinstaller waitress django djangorestframework djangorestframework-simplejwt django-cors-headers && cross-env DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=conf.settings pyinstaller --noconfirm --onedir --name backend_server --add-data "apps;apps" --add-data "conf;conf" --add-data "manage.py;." manage.py
